_comment: 从旧 checkpoint 完整续训的示例 / Example: fully resume training from an existing checkpoint

experiment._comment: languages 及顺序必须与旧 checkpoint 完全一致 / Languages and their order must exactly match the checkpoint
experiment.name: model_1_resume

initialization._comment: resume 会恢复 Generator、Discriminator、Optimizer、epoch 和 step / resume restores Generator, Discriminator, optimizers, epoch and step

generation._comment: 续训直接使用已有数据，不重新调用 Qwen / Reuse existing data and do not call Qwen again

pipeline._comment: 已有冻结音素 metadata，因此跳过生成和音素化 / Existing metadata already contains frozen phonemes, so generation and phonemization are skipped

training._comment: epochs 是总目标轮数，必须大于 checkpoint 已完成轮数 / epochs is the total target and must exceed the checkpoint epoch
